content.question: How accurate is age-10/12 selection into gymnázium tracks at predicting genuine long-term academic and labor-market performance for Hungarian students, and what is the rate of false negatives (students capable of gymnázium-level work but not selected)?
content.reduction_path: Longitudinal follow-up study of Hungarian Grade 4-5 cohorts denied entry to 8-year gymnázium, tracking their subsequent secondary and tertiary attainment and earnings; matched comparison of within-gymnázium versus within-secondary-modern performance trajectories to estimate predictive validity.
